headline: Fiserv Targets ‘Constant Compounder’ Comeback as Clover, AI and Banking Bets Ramp
summary: Fiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) Chief Executive Officer Mike Lyons said the payments and financial technology company is focused on returning to a “constant compounder” profile by sharpening its business mix, improving execution and investing around two major markets: banking and commerce. Speaking with J.P.
